<!--
Thank you for sending a pull request to the Athos Kubernetes operator.
Please fill in each section below so reviewers can move your change
through quickly. Boxes you have already done can be checked with `[x]`.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One short paragraph describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build/CI/dependency update
- [ ] Refactor or test-only change

## How was this tested?

<!--
Tick every box that applies and add details where helpful.
Local-only changes (docs/CI/refactors) are fine without a kind run.
-->

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `make verify-fmt` is clean
- [ ] `make lint` is clean
- [ ] `make test-e2e` against a kind cluster
- [ ] Manual smoke test (describe below)

```bash
# paste reproduction commands or screenshots if relevant
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My commit messages follow the project convention
      (`<scope>: <imperative summary>`).
- [ ] I have added tests that fail without the change.
- [ ] I have updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) if the change is
      user-visible.
- [ ] My change does not contain emojis or AI-generation markers.

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456. -->
